curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff, which modifies only src/FontMetrics.php. The patch removes a line that derived the local file extension from the remote URL via pathinfo/parse_url and replaces it with a switch statement that hardcodes .ttf. No sibling files share this vulnerability pattern. Vuln class kept as pre-assigned xss (CWE-79); the actual vulnerability is remote code injection via file extension manipulation, but no other class from the valid set is a clearly better fit.
